MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The OSC is re-set to 6/14/2005 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Irene Burns. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-03-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-05-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Elisabeth Madden, Esq. and Robert Lynch, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Masliah, present as guardian ad litem for the Minor: Elizabeth Masliah.
Brett Pedersen, Esq. for Defendants/Cross Complainants: A-Safe Way Driving School and Panya S. Lee.
Defendant: Jim P. Fontillas, present in pro per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff will dismiss all claims with prejudice, each to bear own costs and fees.
Defendant Lee, agreed to pay $60,000.00 to be sent to Ms. Madden's office on or before Feb. 2, 2005 and if defaulted, judgment for Punitive damages in the amount of $60,000.00.
Plaintiff is not party to the settlement agreement between the Defendants Lee and Fontillas.
Counsels Stipulated to Set Aside SANCTIONS ORDER entered on June 24, 2004.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.
Matter is placed on CRC 225 calendar in Dept. 212 on April 5, 2005 at 10 a.m. for Dismissal of the Complaint, and Dec. 6, 2005 at 10 a.m. for Dismissal of the Cross-Complaint.
